title: Multi-Domain Strike Coordination
description: Joint task force must synchronize kinetic, cyber, electronic warfare, and space effects to disable an enemy integrated air defense network and enable follow-on bomber operations. Timing and deconfliction are critical.

enemy_force.name: Enemy IADS Network
enemy_force.disposition: Layered air defense with early warning, acquisition, and engagement radars networked via fiber and satellite
enemy_force.strength_estimate: 12 SAM battalions, 40 aircraft on alert, integrated C2 node
enemy_force.most_likely_coa: Shift to emission control upon detection of friendly air movement; rely on passive sensors.
enemy_force.most_dangerous_coa: Preemptive missile strike on friendly airfields combined with cyber attack on C2.
known_vulnerabilities: Fiber optic backbone has 3 known physical access points
C2 node relies on unencrypted backup radio

terrain.name: Enemy IADS Belt
terrain.description: Mountainous terrain providing radar line of sight advantages.

restrictions: No kinetic effects in neutral shipping lanes
higher_intent: Establish air superiority by neutralizing enemy IADS to enable strategic strike campaign.
